rules.comment: Directive MINIMUMS, used as the fallback for countries without a vetted rule set: 2-year seller liability from delivery (Art. 10(1)) and 1-year reversed burden of proof (Art. 11(1); member states may keep or introduce 2 years). Cross-checked against the official Your Europe summary on 2026-07-07. Copy must say national law can be more generous.

14 days from the day the consumer acquires physical possession of the goods (Art. 9(1), 9(2)(b)); cross-checked against the official Your Europe summary on 2026-07-07. Documented simplifications: (1) exemptions exist (personalised goods, unsealed hygiene goods, etc.) — copy must note them; (2) the deadline extension to the next working day when it falls on a weekend/holiday (Regulation 1182/71) is not modelled — v1 counts calendar days.
